evals.prompt: Execute the development plan in PLAN.md. Build the project completely, run all tests, and mark everything as done.
evals.expected_output: All PLAN.md checklist items marked as [x]. A working wc/ Python package with word/line/char/byte counting CLI. All unit and integration tests passing. README.md and pyproject.toml present.

evals.prompt: Follow PLAN.md and implement this project. Don't stop until everything is built, tested, and verified.
evals.expected_output: All PLAN.md checklist items marked as [x]. A working Express.js REST API with CRUD endpoints for todos, in-memory storage, validation, and error handling. Jest tests all passing. README.md present.

evals.prompt: Build this library according to PLAN.md. Implement every function, write all tests, make sure everything passes.
evals.expected_output: All PLAN.md checklist items marked as [x]. A working strutils/ Python package with slugify, truncate, camel_to_snake, snake_to_camel, extract_emails, and mask_string functions. Pytest tests all passing. README.md and pyproject.toml present.
